license_strategy: Safety-governance tomo built from original synthesis and selected official/public-domain-or-copyright-free sources. Do not embed proprietary pediatric manuals or sites with AI/RAG prohibitions. Final legal review required.

excluded_sources.title: AAP / HealthyChildren and proprietary pediatric references
excluded_sources.reason: Clinically valuable but not ingested due to licensing/copyright uncertainty for RAG embeddings.

excluded_sources.title: MedlinePlus / A.D.A.M. pages
excluded_sources.reason: Known restrictions against automated extraction / AI dataset / RAG embedding use without express written consent.

excluded_sources.title: Blogs, forums, commercial symptom checkers, social media
excluded_sources.reason: Not appropriate as source of pediatric safety policy for medical RAG.

ORIGINAL-PEDS-SAFE-001.title: Original pediatric safety and AI-response governance framework
ORIGINAL-PEDS-SAFE-001.license_notes: Original authored safety framework. Requires pediatrician, legal and child-safeguarding review.
ORIGINAL-PEDS-SAFE-001.used_for: Safety gates, refusal/blocking logic, escalation, caregiver communication and PHI minimization.

CDC-FLU-001.title: CDC - Signs and Symptoms of Flu
CDC-FLU-001.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
CDC-FLU-001.license_notes: Official .gov page; final legal review required.
CDC-FLU-001.used_for: Emergency pediatric warning signs: fast/trouble breathing, bluish lips/face, rib retractions, dehydration, not alert, seizures, any fever under 12 weeks.

CDC-RSV-001.title: CDC - RSV in Infants and Young Children
CDC-RSV-001.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
CDC-RSV-001.license_notes: Official .gov page; final legal review required.
CDC-RSV-001.used_for: RSV infant risk, trouble breathing, dehydration/low intake and worsening symptoms.

CDC-CONCUSSION-001.license_notes: Official .gov page; final legal review required.
CDC-CONCUSSION-001.used_for: Concussion danger signs and post-head-injury escalation.
